---
title: "Yellow Island Intertidal Monitoring"
subtitle: "2022 - 2026"
description: "Assessing intertidal community composition using metabarcoding approaches"
---

### Project Overview & Purpose

### Quick Links

1.  Project repo

2.  Process/ Workflow

3.  Literature

4.  Methods & Protocols

### Research Questions

### Anticipated Products & Findings

### Next Steps
